---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new tool or improvement
labels: enhancement
---

**What would you like?**
A clear description of the feature or new Stability.ai endpoint you'd like supported.

**Use case**
How would you use this? What problem does it solve?

**Stability.ai API reference**
Link to the relevant endpoint in the [Stability.ai docs](https://platform.stability.ai/docs/api-reference), if applicable.
